name: agentic-lint-ratchet
description: Helm chart and optional GitHub Actions cron for lint-ratchet automation

scripts.lint:yaml: python3 -c "import yamllint" 2>/dev/null || python3 -m pip install -q yamllint==1.35.1; python3 -m yamllint .github .lint-ratchet.config.yml config workflows Chart.yaml actions values.yaml
